name: Returns-and-Warranty-V2.docx
content:
What is C.E. King’s return policy and warranty?

C.E. King machines carry a manufacturer’s warranty of 12 months from delivery or acceptance (whichever is later), or 2,200 working hours, whichever occurs first. Returns of unused goods may be accepted subject to the terms and conditions of sale. Contact the support team before returning any item.

Details

  • Warranty period: 12 months from delivery or acceptance, or 2,200 working hours — whichever occurs first
  • Warranty covers: conformity with the agreed specification, freedom from material defects in design, material and workmanship, and satisfactory quality
  • Warranty remedy: C.E. King will, at its option, repair, replace, or refund the defective equipment — this is the buyer’s sole and exclusive remedy for breach of warranty
  • Repaired or replaced parts are warranted for the unexpired portion of the original warranty period only
  • Warranty does not cover: fair wear and tear, wilful damage, abnormal storage, negligence, misuse, failure to follow instructions, or unauthorised alteration or repair without C.E. King’s prior written consent
  • Further use of equipment after reporting a defect may void the warranty for that issue
  • Claims for shortage or visible damage: notify C.E. King in writing within 3 business days of delivery
  • Claims for non-delivery: notify in writing within 7 days of expected delivery date
  • Claims for hidden defects: notify in writing within 7 business days of discovery and within the warranty period
  • All claims must include: description of the defect, photographic or video evidence where practicable, equipment serial number(s), and confirmation that C.E. King personnel will be given access for inspection
  • Preserve defective equipment in its post-failure condition until inspected by C.E. King — unauthorised repair, modification, or disassembly voids warranty rights
  • If C.E. King requires return of defective equipment, the buyer returns at own risk and cost; if defect is confirmed and covered, C.E. King reimburses reasonable return costs
  • Spare parts returns: accepted for unused items in original packaging, subject to a restocking fee
  • Contact support@ceking.com before returning any item, providing your invoice number and description of the issue
  • If a machine arrives damaged, report immediately with photographs to both C.E. King and the carrier

https://www.ceking.com/policies/refund-policy
